section.title: 7.1 Description
section.p: The retrieval engine uses multiple signals when ranking candidate chunks.
These signals allow the system to improve relevance beyond simple vector similarity.

section.title: 7.2 Vector Similarity
section.p: Semantic similarity between the user query embedding and the chunk embedding.

section.title: 7.3 Keyword Matching
section.p: Semantic similarity between the user query embedding and the chunk embedding.

section.title: 7.4 Hierarchy Signals
section.p: Structural signals derived from document titles and headings.
These signals help prioritize content that appears in higher-level sections of a document.

section.title: 7.5 Metadata Signals (Planned)
section.p: Future versions of the system will incorporate metadata signals into ranking.
These signals will allow the retrieval system to incorporate structured document information into relevance scoring.
